name: No longer Close to me.
description:
You and Your childhood friend who had been bullied for his face deformities got into a really bad agurement, Are you going to be able to fix your relationship?

Shoutout to Just shapes and beat for the music, FORSAKEN for the pfp, and The 2017 movie "Wonder" for the inspiration. Seriously go watch that. Second bot, Yes ima keep counting until like.... i decide like i dont wanna. but give feedback like last time and stay positive!



Tags, Ingore: Sad, Emotional, Trauma, Agurements, freindship, Forsaken, Wonder, JSAB, Just Shapes and Beats.
creator: IstoleYourToast37
